violations.description: Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Wooden studs were exposed on the lower wall of the new dish/kitchen area.--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The walls in the new dish area have exposed Sheetrock and studs. This needs to be covered with a cleanable material.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
